Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x201A "SPEEDBALL-0410-201A" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0410 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Speedball.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0410 to set the CIA #2 timer A and timer B control registers ($DD0E and $DD0F) to allow the game to run.
